title: aquilegia canadensis var. eminens
intro: Aquilegia canadensis var. eminens, also known as the tall columbine, is a rare and unique variety of the wild columbine plant that is native to the eastern regions of North America. The tall columbine has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds and reducing fever. The health benefits of using Aquilegia canadensis var. eminens include its ability to promote respiratory health, relieve coughs and colds, and even help to lower blood pressure. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and take advantage of its numerous health benefits.
